about.title: About me
about.bio:
I am a full-stack developer focused on building scalable web applications. I work across both frontend and backend, paying attention to architecture, performance and long-term maintainability. 

 My journey started with backend development in Python to understand core programming concepts. Later I moved to Golang and expanded my stack with TypeScript and React, allowing me to design and build complete applications from interface to infrastructure.

typescript.name: TypeScript
typescript.desc: Strong typing, generics, scalable frontend architecture.

vite.name: Vite
vite.desc: Fast dev environment and optimized builds.
